reviews.title: Excellent offline mode
reviews.body: Love the offline mode feature. Works great without internet. Best offline experience.
reviews.author: cuser1

reviews.title: Great dark mode
reviews.body: Dark mode is beautifully implemented. Easy on the eyes at night. Really well done.
reviews.author: cuser2

reviews.title: No crashes
reviews.body: Very stable app. Never crashes. Smooth performance all the time.
reviews.author: cuser3

reviews.title: Okay but expensive
reviews.body: Good features but the premium price is too high. Needs better value for money.
reviews.author: cuser4

reviews.title: Missing customization
reviews.body: Lacks customization options. The interface feels rigid and inflexible.
reviews.author: cuser5
